\tzpentry{ID3651}{Grav Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3651 introduces Grav Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\text{grav}} = \int_{\Sigma} K_{ij}h^{ij}\sqrt{h} \, d^3x \end{equation}
